value_picks.name: TowneBank
value_picks.why_undervalued: TowneBank screened as ~50% discounted to an estimated cash-flow-based fair value (current price $36.53 vs fair value $72.33) in the week of Jan 22, 2026, consistent with a contrarian setup into Jan 23, 2026.
value_picks.bull_case: If rate cuts stabilize funding costs and credit stays benign, a high-quality regional bank like TowneBank can re-rate toward historical multiples while continuing to return capital via dividends.

value_picks.name: Old National Bancorp
value_picks.why_undervalued: Old National Bancorp screened as ~50% discounted to an estimated cash-flow-based fair value (current price $24.02 vs fair value $47.68) around Jan 22, 2026.
value_picks.bull_case: As the regional bank group mean-reverts and NIM pressure eases, ONB’s low-teens P/E can expand while the dividend supports total return.

value_picks.name: Seven Hills Realty Trust
value_picks.why_undervalued: Seven Hills Realty Trust screened as ~49% discounted to an estimated fair value (current price $9.20 vs fair value $18.20) around Jan 22, 2026, and offered a double-digit dividend yield typical of out-of-favor credit/real-estate lenders.
value_picks.bull_case: If credit conditions remain stable and payout proves sustainable, the stock can recover via yield compression plus book/earnings normalization.

value_picks.name: Motorcar Parts of America
value_picks.why_undervalued: Motorcar Parts of America screened as ~49% discounted to an estimated fair value (current price $13.42 vs fair value $26.25) around Jan 22, 2026, with an FCF yield shown around ~10% in historical ratio data.
value_picks.bull_case: A cyclical trough plus margin recovery in the aftermarket parts business could drive earnings normalization and a sharp re-rating from depressed sentiment.

value_picks.name: Huntington Bancshares
value_picks.why_undervalued: Huntington Bancshares screened as ~48% discounted to an estimated cash-flow-based fair value (current price $18.77 vs fair value $36.40) around Jan 22, 2026, and third-party estimates showed ~9% forward FCF yield in mid-Jan 2026.
value_picks.bull_case: If the economy avoids recession and the Fed eases, HBAN can benefit from loan growth and multiple expansion from depressed regional-bank valuations.

momentum_picks.name: Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises
momentum_picks.catalyst: Strong January 2026 price momentum per monthly gainer rankings, likely driven by higher beta exposure to industrial/energy capex narratives.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High upside if contract wins/cash generation inflect, but the stock is volatile and highly sensitive to execution and liquidity.

momentum_picks.name: Bloom Energy
momentum_picks.catalyst: January 2026 momentum suggests renewed investor appetite for power generation and data-center/AI-adjacent energy infrastructure themes.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Compelling if bookings/margins surprise upward, but valuation and policy sensitivity can amplify drawdowns.

momentum_picks.name: ImmunityBio
momentum_picks.catalyst: Explosive January 2026 momentum in biotech likely tied to clinical/regulatory progress expectations and high short-interest dynamics.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Potentially outsized upside on positive data, but binary biotech risk remains elevated.

momentum_picks.name: Corvus Pharmaceuticals
momentum_picks.catalyst: Large January 2026 gain consistent with biotech breakout behavior around pipeline updates and risk-on rotation into high-beta healthcare.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Upside if clinical readouts validate thesis; downside is severe if trials disappoint.

momentum_picks.name: Astera Labs
momentum_picks.catalyst: Sharp January 2026 outperformance aligns with AI infrastructure interconnect/semiconductor momentum as investors bid up enablers of data-center scaling.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Attractive if hyperscaler demand stays strong, but crowded AI trade and cyclicality increase pullback risk.

watchlist_updates.detail: Reported outstanding earnings and announced US capex increase to $52-56B by 2026.
Q4 earnings $14.01 per share exceeding Zacks consensus $11.77.
Hit 52-week low of $295.42 on Jan 16, closed $301.07 on Jan 23.
Plummeted after reporting larger-than-expected loss and anticipated further losses next quarter.
Q4 earnings $2.68 per share above Zacks estimate $2.41.
Gained amid semiconductor rebound following TSM earnings.
